mapper.sql: id, sku, title, vendor, plan_name, description, price, available_stock, sold_count, status, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM shop_product WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id DESC
SELECT FROM shop_product ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id DESC
SELECT FROM shop_product WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM shop_product WHERE sku = #{sku} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM shop_product WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE shop_product SET sku = #{sku}, title = #{title}, vendor = #{vendor}, plan_name = #{planName}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE shop_product p SET available_stock = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_account pa WHERE pa.product_id = p.id AND pa.resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' AND pa.sale_status = 'UNSOLD' AND pa.enable_status = 'ENABLED' ), sold_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_account pa WHERE pa.product_id = p.id AND pa.resource_type = 'CARD_KEY' AND pa.sale_status = 'SOLD' )
